---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for workflow or controller behavior
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

What workflow problem are you trying to solve?

## Proposed Behavior

Describe the desired behavior from the user perspective.

## Why This Helps

Explain why this improves live/recording workflow.

## Alternatives Considered

List alternatives you considered.

## Additional Context

Add diagrams, mappings, or examples if needed.
